body.title: Route minion/build tasks to cheap models via inference proxy
body.result: WorkerEnvelope.task_class propagated to InferenceRequest; minion tag → qwen3.5-9b via OR; cost/tokens accumulated in WorkerResult and logged to channel
body.description:
Granny currently routes all CC work to Claude (expensive). Add a task-class concept: minion tasks (builds, simple transforms, boilerplate) route to cheap models (Qwen via Ollama or OpenRouter) instead of Anthropic. Ticket tags or a new 'complexity' field determines routing. Immediate cost reduction for factory-of-factories workloads.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/device.py, devices/granny/daemon.py, lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (complexity field TBD)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: complexity/class field on tickets, routing rule in Granny, Ollama/OR as cheap target. Out of scope: full eval harness (T-model-eval-harness), provider redesign (T-inference-proxy-mini-rack).
**Completion criteria:** A ticket tagged 'minion' routes to Qwen via Ollama, not Claude. Cost per ticket logged.
